title: StreamForge

blocks.content: # 🎮 StreamForge – Stream Announcement Assistant **StreamForge** is a sleek, all-in-one WinForms application built for streamers who want to simplify their weekly Twitch announcements. It helps you search games directly from Steam, build a clean stream schedule, and automatically post professional announcements to your Discord server — all with one click. ---
blocks.heading: About

sidebarNote: Download the zip, extract, and run.
releaseNotes: Stream schedule builder with Steam/RAWG search and Discord announcements. Extract the zip and run — no installer.
note: Stream schedule builder with Steam/RAWG search and Discord announcements. Extract the zip and run — no installer.
